title: Using skopeo copy from Nix source to docker-daemon target produces no image

comments.body:
It appears I was wrong about 1.13.X and 1.14.1 behaving the same, 1.14.1 actually errors out instead of "silently" failing:

https://github.com/nlewo/nix2container/issues/112#issuecomment-1913397176

This is almost certainly not a skopeo bug at this point, so I'm going to close it.  I'll continue chasing the root cause down at https://github.com/nlewo/nix2container/issues/112
FWIW, I think the missing error reports _were_ a long-standing Skopeo bug (https://github.com/containers/image/issues/955 ) , fixed in 1.14.0.
